blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain, highs of 40°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
